transcript.clean_text: it was the morning after the day before the tour de france had seen a gc revolution on stage 11 a big day that put jonas vinegar in the yellow jersey a master plan executed by jumbo visma putting taree pogachar under pressure dropping him seriously for the first time in his career and seeing jonas winger will take his first ever tour de france stage win putting three minutes and a second including the bonuses into bogatyard and taking the yellow jersey vingagor leading ahead of balde with polgacha in third thomas fourth and quintana in fifth a new day a new opportunity jumbo visma charged with defense of yellow this time and three more huge climbs to take on the galilee for the second day in succession showing that he was up for the fight and ready to try and take back yellow called the quad the fair as well as the mighty alpedues also on the menu 165.1 kilometers 4 600 meters of climbing in terms of pure elevation and the mighty mountains a classic stage the queen stage of this 109th tour de france the 21 famous hairpins as albedoes comes back for the first time in four years this the profile of the last test the thousands of supporters will once again be back after covert times the break took a while to form began to form seriously on the ascent of the galilee and then chris froome counter-attacked very close to the top attacking on the way down would be thomas pidcock a master class in descending by the bottom he was not only joined up with those right at the front of the race he'd be ahead of them louvelle was dropped he wouldn't see the front again pitco would be the last to join alongside froome a hundred kilometers in high heat still awaited the riders the brake would take a nice big gap pushing on for eight minutes as they went up the call de la cuado faire it was down to six and a half minutes and yombo visma were going to work behind and the rest working for yonas winger it looks as though the breakaway might be in trouble with their gap less than five minutes inside the final 50 kilometers but on the descent heading into the flat run into azeroth at the base of the final climb the gap was once again growing the mighty out awaited 70 years after the first ever ascent which incidentally had been the first ever summit finish faster copy winning on that day just over 10 and a half kilometers remained when thomas pitch took off on tour de france debut dropping pilot and chicony meinke's was close froome in attendance as well but those gaps continue to grow supporters on the classic climb looking left and right peacock riding away to the stage and behind roglich doing the damage this time in deluxe domestique mode quintana go guru and even roman balder dropped by the time he'd finished his work many of them would fight on it'd be a recovery day too for enrique mass and today pogachar would show he was up for the fight not one attack but at least two or three garage thomas dropped on a couple of occasions and fighting his way back peacock riding away to a first ever tour stage win on debut bulgacha trying to go again vingagor sticking to his back wheel however and thomas working his way back has he done throughout his career it's early in the road career of tom pidkop already a mountain bike olympic champion a cyclocross world champion now a tour de france stage winner on one of its most famous finishes pitch riding away back into the top 10 but more importantly picking up his first grand tour stage win ineos first of the season with louie meinke's finishing second closer than he's ever come before and chris froome fighting showing work grit and determination getting back to the front of the race for the first time since this awful accident no big splits on the way in as pogachar was there with vinegar thomas crossing the line as well valde working to get back on but losing his spot on the podium thomas moving up to third pogaccha back in second vingel with a two-minute 22 lead in the yellow jersey victory for tom pidcock blast off the planet pidcock for tour de france beating meineke's froome powerless and then the gc group pogaccha winger and thomas emerick mass having a better day after losing eight minutes the day before the tour de france certainly not over bulgarcha showing he's up for the fight but pogs not back yet the gc looking like this leaving the alps vinegar with a two-minute 22 lead 226 over thomas and valdez still in close contact as well so away from the alps they go transition time into sai tien almost 200 kilometers of racing and a day that on paper at least looks easier than the last two or three they've had more mountainous appointments await they'll come in the pyrenees before that a little trip to the massive central the tour de france continues on stage 13 and you'll be able to watch it as always live or on demand on gcn plus and discovery plus you
